title: lithocarpus luteus
intro: Lithocarpus luteus, also known as the golden or California tanbark oak, is a deciduous tree species native to the western coast of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Lithocarpus luteus include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and treating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
